assertions.text: Correctly identifies system as high-risk under Annex III Area 4 (recruitment/candidate selection) via Art. 6(2)
assertions.evidence: Response explicitly states 'HIGH-RISK AI SYSTEM under Art. 6(2) + Annex III, Area 4(a), which explicitly covers recruitment and selection: application filtering/screening, candidate evaluation and selection'

assertions.text: Lists at least 4 key provider obligations from Arts. 9-17 (e.g., risk management, data governance, human oversight, conformity assessment)
assertions.evidence: Lists risk management system (Art. 9), data governance (Art. 10), transparency/instructions for use (Art. 13), human oversight (Art. 14), accuracy/robustness (Art. 15), conformity assessment (Art. 43), logging (Art. 12) — well over 4

assertions.text: States the 2 August 2026 compliance deadline for Annex III high-risk systems
assertions.evidence: Response explicitly states '2 August 2026 application date' for Annex III high-risk obligations

assertions.text: Mentions CE marking (Art. 48) and EU AI database registration (Art. 49) requirements
assertions.evidence: Response explicitly mentions 'CE marking (Art. 48)' and 'EU AI database registration (Art. 49) before market placement' as mandatory pre-market steps

assertions.text: Identifies the correct conformity assessment path: self-assessment (Annex VI) for Annex III Area 4 systems (Points 2-8)
assertions.evidence: Response explicitly states 'self-assessment conformity assessment' (Annex VI internal control) for Annex III Points 2-8 systems — no notified body required for employment AI
